title: My Zines
quote: "Digital Nomad and Street Photographer, I spend half the year traveling around the world, capturing the essence of urban life through my lens."

items.title: 02 Prt, Hun, Ita
items.content:
This zine presents a collection of street photography I captured between late July and the end of October 2023, during the first three months of a nine-month, three-part journey. This section spans Portugal, Hungary, and Italy. While the photos aren't in chronological order, they've been carefully paired to harmonize in color and style.

I don't believe in calling it luck-l've made intentional choices to build the life I have. But as I look through this series of photos, I feel a profound sense of fulfillment, joy, and gratitude. I can honestly say I'm living my best life.

items.title: 01 Mex
items.content:
During the winter of 2022/2023, I had the privilege of living in Mexico for six wonderful months. While I mainly stayed in Mexico City, I also took short trips to Querétaro, San Miguel de Allende, Taxco, and a few other places.

In this zine, I’ve curated a selection of street photographs that I love and that complement each other well. To see more images from this series, you can visit the gallery on my website.
